page: OVHcloud r3-128 is a memory-optimized server instance powered by an AMD EPYC Milan processor. It features 16 dedicated physical cores running at 2.3 GHz on the x86_64 architecture, with no hyperthreading enabled. The system is equipped with 128.0 GB of RAM, providing a high memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per core. Local storage is provided by a 400 GB NVMe SSD, and network connectivity is supported by a 4 Gbps baseline bandwidth.

Benchmark results indicate top-tier memory performance, with the PassMark memory score ranking in the top 10% of tested systems. Large-block memory read and write bandwidths are strong, reaching 223.45 GB/sec and 117.55 GB/sec respectively. Single-core CPU performance is strong, as evidenced by stress-ng and Geekbench single-core scores, while multi-core CPU performance and database operations fall within the average range. The instance also demonstrates strong performance in single- and multi-threaded bzip3 decompression and text processing.

Given its dedicated AMD EPYC cores and top-tier memory performance, the r3-128 offers high resource density for memory-bound workloads. The inclusion of local NVMe SSD storage and a high memory-to-vCPU ratio makes this instance highly suitable for database hosting, caching layers such as Redis, text processing, and small-scale language model inference.
description: OVHcloud r3-128 is a memory-optimized server instance featuring 16 dedicated physical cores on an AMD EPYC Milan processor running at 2.3 GHz. Built on the x86_64 architecture, it delivers 128.0 GB of RAM and includes a 400 GB NVMe SSD for local storage. The network configuration provides a 4 Gbps baseline bandwidth. Benchmarks highlight top-tier memory performance, with PassMark memory scores in the top 10% and strong large-block memory bandwidth. Single-core CPU performance is also strong, while multi-core metrics and database operations remain average. This resource profile is well-suited for memory-intensive applications, database hosting, caching layers, and text processing workloads.
og_description: OVHcloud r3-128 is a memory-optimized server featuring 16 dedicated AMD EPYC Milan cores, 128 GB RAM, and a 400 GB NVMe SSD, delivering top-tier memory performance for databases and caching.
meta_description: OVHcloud r3-128 is a memory-optimized server with 16 dedicated AMD EPYC cores, 128 GB RAM, and a 400 GB NVMe SSD, ideal for database workloads.
tagline: A memory-optimized server featuring dedicated AMD EPYC cores, high-speed NVMe storage, and top-tier memory bandwidth for demanding database workloads.
bullet_points: 16 dedicated AMD EPYC Milan physical cores running at 2.3 GHz
128.0 GB of RAM providing a high 8.0 GB per core ratio
400 GB of high-speed local NVMe SSD storage
Top-tier memory performance and strong large-block memory bandwidth
4 Gbps baseline network bandwidth with one public IPv4 address
Optimized for databases, caching layers, and memory-intensive applications
